from manim import *

class SierpinskiTriangle(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Sierpiński Triangle", font_size=36, color=WHITE)
        title.to_edge(UP, buff=0.4)
        self.play(Write(title))

        # Section 1 — Setup
        triangle = Polygon(np.array([-2, -1.73, 0]), np.array([2, -1.73, 0]), np.array([0, 2.6, 0]), color=WHITE, stroke_width=2)
        self.play(Create(triangle))
        self.wait(1)

        # Section 2 — Recursive drawing
        def draw_sierpinski(triangle, depth):
            if depth == 0:
                return
            p1, p2, p3 = triangle.get_vertices()
            mid1 = (p1 + p2) / 2
            mid2 = (p2 + p3) / 2
            mid3 = (p3 + p1) / 2
            self.play(Create(Polygon(p1, mid1, mid3, color=WHITE, stroke_width=2)))
            self.play(Create(Polygon(p2, mid1, mid2, color=WHITE, stroke_width=2)))
            self.play(Create(Polygon(p3, mid2, mid3, color=WHITE, stroke_width=2)))
            self.wait(0.5)
            draw_sierpinski(Polygon(p1, mid1, mid3, color=WHITE, stroke_width=2), depth - 1)
            draw_sierpinski(Polygon(p2, mid1, mid2, color=WHITE, stroke_width=2), depth - 1)
            draw_sierpinski(Polygon(p3, mid2, mid3, color=WHITE, stroke_width=2), depth - 1)

        draw_sierpinski(triangle, 5)
        self.wait(2)

        # Section 3 — Conclusion
        self.play(*[FadeOut(m) for m in self.mobjects])
